features: High Quality Materials: Our plastic champagne glasses are made from shatterproof, BPA-free materials to ensure safe use, and the plastic champagne glasses combine elegance with practicality, making them perfect for your event.

Lightweight and Portable: These prosecco glasses are lightweight and easy to carry, perfect for on-the-go. Designed to be easy to grip and very comfortable when enjoying drinks such as cocktails and mixed drinks;enjoy a stylish toast with convenience.

Bulk Convenient Supply:Our package includes 50 plastic champagne flutes with a 5 oz capacity to provide a plentiful supply for your large party, event or celebration. This ensures that all of your guests can enjoy a glass of bubbly without having to worry about running out of glassware.

Shatterproof & Durable: Unlike fragile glass, Woobroo plastic champagne glasses are shatterproof and extremely durable.This makes them perfect for accident-prone events such as crowded parties or venues with limited space. You can enjoy your celebration without worrying about broken glass.

Easy Clean up : After the party is over, cleaning up becomes hassle-free with plastic champagne flutes glass.Made of shatterproof plastic, these clear plastic champagne glasses can be reused or discarded for easy clean up; ideal for cutting costs and reducing waste at bars or large parties!
